description_long: This kiosk is a tall, rectangular column structure with a smooth, continuous surface, standing on a square wooden platform. The exterior is wrapped in a high-resolution printed graphic featuring a woman's face, lush green leaves, and the bold text 'RESORT EXTRUSIONS' running vertically. The kiosk's surface appears to be made of a rigid, glossy material, likely a combination of metal or composite panels with a laminated print overlay. There are no visible windows, doors, or interactive elements, giving it a monolithic and modern appearance. The top of the kiosk is flat and seamlessly integrated with the sides, and the base is flush with the wooden platform. The overall design is sleek and visually striking, intended to attract attention in commercial or urban environments.
description: A tall, rectangular kiosk with glossy printed graphics, featuring a woman's face and bold vertical text, mounted on a wooden platform. The structure is modern, seamless, and visually prominent.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full printed graphic with the text 'RESORT EXTRUSIONS' and a partial view of a woman's face, with a person standing beside the kiosk for scale.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the continuation of the printed graphic, with the text and the woman's face wrapping around the corner, and the person standing to the left.
description_view_2: Rear angled view shows the kiosk's seamless surface and the edge of the printed graphic, with less of the woman's face visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the other edge of the kiosk, with the text and graphic wrapping around, and the person now on the right side.
attribute_signage_type: Printed sign integrated into the structure, featuring the text 'RESORT EXTRUSIONS' in large vertical letters and a photographic image, covering the main exterior surfaces.
attribute_roof_design: Flat roof, seamless with the vertical panels, no overhangs or decorative elements.
attribute_architectural_style: Modern minimalist with commercial branding emphasis.
